creator: milosz.kaniewski@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 222803
Patch

The patch updates sysutils/snmp_exporter to 0.20.0.

There is no longer a "vendor" directory inside the upstream package. I followed https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#using-go to deal with that.

The updated port builds properly. I tested both snmp_exporter and snmp_exporter_generator binaries.
